title: taraxacum bellidifolium
intro: Taraxacum bellidifolium, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, liver and kidney disorders, and skin conditions, due to its high content of vitamins A, C, and potassium. Taraxacum bellidifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its health benefits, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
